disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden onset tonight of frankly blood-stained urine containing clots
trigger_question_examples: What does your urine look like?
When did the bleeding start and are there any clots?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It came on suddenly tonight — my urine looks like pure blood and there are dark clots coming out.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe intermittent cramping pain in the flank radiating to the back, coming in waves
trigger_question_examples: Where is the pain and what does it feel like?
Does the pain come in waves or is it constant?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's a severe gripping cramp in my side and around my back that comes in waves and makes me pace the room, then eases off.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: A heavy upper-respiratory viral illness over the last three days, now resolving, with the urinary bleeding starting as the cold settled
trigger_question_examples: Have you been unwell recently, such as with a cold or infection?
What was happening in the days before the bleeding started?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I had a really heavy head cold for the last three days that's just about gone now, and the blood in my urine came on right as the cold was settling.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Past episodes of visible blood in the urine that were painless and settled on their own
trigger_question_examples: Has this ever happened before?
Have you ever seen blood in your urine in the past?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've seen visible blood in my urine once or twice before, but those times it never hurt and it just went away by itself.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: GP has previously found traces of blood in the urine on testing between visible episodes
trigger_question_examples: Has your GP ever found anything in your urine tests before?
Have you had urine tests done in the past?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My GP has told me before that there are traces of blood in my urine on the dipstick, even at times when I couldn't see any.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Recently told blood pressure is mildly raised, nothing started
trigger_question_examples: Have you been told anything about your blood pressure?
Any recent health checks?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I was told recently my blood pressure was a little bit up, but nothing was started for it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Has been taking over-the-counter ibuprofen for the cold
trigger_question_examples: Have you taken any medicines or painkillers for the cold?
Are you taking anything over the counter?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've been taking over-the-counter ibuprofen for the cold over the last few days.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No skin rash and no joint pain or swelling
trigger_question_examples: Any rash on your skin, especially your legs or buttocks?
Any joint pains or swelling?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I haven't got any rash and my joints are fine — no aches or swelling.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Still able to pass urine despite the bleeding — no complete blockage
trigger_question_examples: Are you still able to pass urine, or is it becoming difficult or impossible?
Do you feel a painful full bladder you cannot empty?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I can still pass urine okay, it's just very bloody — it's not blocked up.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever or shaking chills, not dizzy or faint
trigger_question_examples: Do you have a fever or shaking chills?
Do you feel dizzy, faint or lightheaded when you stand up?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fevers or shakes that I've noticed, and I don't feel dizzy or faint.
